name: Product Owner / Developer
role: Sponsor, Architect, and sole developer. Defines product vision, priorities, and technical decisions. Also the primary end-user for the MVP phase.
interests: Fast, maintainable codebase using modern Android stack (Jetpack Compose, Hilt, Room)
Scalable architecture capable of growing into a SaaS/B2C product
Predictable infrastructure costs as user base grows (motivates Supabase over Firestore)
Well-structured SQL schema enabling complex financial reports without heavy client-side processing
Clean separation of concerns (Repository pattern, ViewModel) for long-term maintainability
